title: Arno Janssens appointed Head of Middle East at SIAC
description: Arno Janssens has joined the Singapore International Arbitration Centre as the Head of Middle East.Janssens is an alumnus of University of Chicago Law School. He earned his LLM from the University of Adelaide.Janssens is an independent lawyer specializing in international disputes, licensed to practice law in the State of New York. He serves as counsel, arbitrator, and tribunal secretary in commercial and investor-state arbitrations worldwide.Aside from now serving as the Head of Middle East at
